title: Spectrumcraft SMP + Zombies
description: Extra Modpacks made from the Spectrumcraft Team
body:
# Spectrumcraft SMP + Zombies
Spectrumcraft SMP + Zombies is an extra experience from the Spectrumcraft team, made with the purpose of creating a zombie modpack, filled with QOL and adventure mod for a dangerous, apocalyptic and exiting adventure with friends

## Are you ready?
![https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/rx0apEZ2/images/03523ff9b3ff409b641e8ce589ca75a05d46b9c5.png](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/rx0apEZ2/images/03523ff9b3ff409b641e8ce589ca75a05d46b9c5.png)

## Modpack still in alpha stage
